title: stopProcess
description: Stop and deregister a background process started by a `runShell` or `runCode` step with a `background` object.

string.title: Stop process (by name)
string.description: Name of the background process to stop.

name.description: Name of the background process to stop.

ignoreMissing.description: If `true`, the step passes even when no process with `name` is registered (for example, it was already stopped or never started).
